title: Triaxial
description: Triaxial: A set of data related to triaxial tests carried out

Id.description: Location identifier relating the borehole to the strata (LOCA_ID).

Top.description: Depth to the top of the sample, measured from the top of the borehole (SAMP_TOP). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

SpecimenDepth.description: Depth to the top of the specimen (SPEC_DPTH). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

UndrainedShearStrength.description: Undrained shear strength at failure (TRIT_CU). Property has a quantity of type Pressure measured in [Pa].

Properties.description: A list of different properties including references and results.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
